name: io.github.TeleKashOracle/mcp-server
description: Prediction market probability oracle + trade broker. 28 tools across 500+ live markets from Kalshi & Polymarket. Per-query pricing, circuit breaker fault tolerance, cross-source arbitrage detection.

environmentVariables.description: Supabase project URL for TeleKash database (optional — works in demo mode without it)
environmentVariables.name: SUPABASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Supabase anonymous key for read access to prediction markets (optional)
environmentVariables.name: SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
